meta.file_purpose: Project overview for investors, new developers, and AI assistants. Single source of truth about what this project is, how it works, and where it stands.

project.name: ВиК График Генератор
project.tagline: AI-powered Gantt schedule generator for Bulgarian water infrastructure projects
project.target_users: Construction engineers and project managers who work on ВиК (water & sewage) tenders in Bulgaria
project.problem_solved: Creating construction Gantt schedules for ВиК tenders is a manual, error-prone process taking days. This app does it in minutes by reading tender documents (PDF, Excel, DOCX) and generating a full schedule using AI.
project.maturity: Production-ready for internal use. Tested on 2 real projects (Герман, Плевен). Not yet deployed as SaaS.
project.language: Bulgarian (UI, prompts, output). Code comments in Bulgarian.

value_proposition.for_investors: Automates a professional task that currently requires a senior engineer and 1-3 days of manual work. The knowledge base grows with every project — the app gets smarter over time. Self-evolving: the AI can write and deploy improvements to its own code.
value_proposition.time_saved_per_project: Estimated 2-3 days of senior engineer time → 15-30 minutes with the app
value_proposition.knowledge_base: 85+ domain rules learned from 8 real ВиК projects, encoded as structured knowledge and injected into every AI prompt
value_proposition.moat: Domain-specific knowledge (ВиК construction norms, Bulgarian regulations, pipe productivity rates, project types) that generic AI does not have

architecture.type: Single-machine Streamlit app (no server, no database, runs locally)

ai_stack.worker_model: DeepSeek V3 (via OpenAI-compatible API) — generates schedules, analyses documents
ai_stack.controller_model: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6 — reviews and corrects worker output, up to 3 correction cycles
ai_stack.pattern: Dual-AI: worker + controller with automatic quality loops
ai_stack.fallback: If DeepSeek fails, Anthropic takes over as worker

pipeline: 1. User selects folder with tender documents
2. FileManager converts PDF/Excel/DOCX/CSV → JSON (3-tier PDF strategy: fitz → DeepSeek reformat → Claude OCR)
3. KnowledgeManager injects domain rules into prompt (3 levels: minimal / full / verification)
4. AIProcessor generates schedule JSON via DeepSeek
5. Anthropic Claude reviews and corrects (up to 3 loops)
6. MS Project enrichment layer adds expert metadata
9. Export: PDF A3, MSPDI XML (MS Project), JSON

self_evolution.description: AI can propose and deploy code changes to itself

codebase.entry_point: app.py (1675 lines) — Streamlit UI and orchestration

modules.src/ai_router.py: DeepSeek/Anthropic routing, fallback logic, cost tracking (1107 lines)
modules.src/ai_processor.py: System prompts, schedule generation, correction loops (959 lines)
modules.src/chat_handler.py: Intent detection, chat logic, session management (1951 lines)
modules.src/file_manager.py: PDF/Excel/DOCX → JSON conversion, 3-tier OCR strategy (1042 lines)
modules.src/gantt_chart.py: Plotly Gantt chart, 9 visualization layers (1003 lines)
modules.src/schedule_builder.py: Task validation, cascade dependencies, diff (685 lines)
modules.src/export_pdf.py: A3 PDF export with Cyrillic fonts via ReportLab (874 lines)
modules.src/export_xml.py: MSPDI XML for MS Project (DurationFormat=5, Manual=1) (477 lines)
modules.src/knowledge_manager.py: Loads and caches domain knowledge files into AI prompts (550 lines)
modules.src/project_manager.py: Recent projects, persistent chat history, AI usage tracking (445 lines)
modules.src/self_evolution.py: AI writes its own code with rollback protection (758 lines)
modules.src/docs_updater.py: Auto-updates README, CHANGELOG, ARCHITECTURE docs (464 lines)

config.config/app_config.json: App settings, supported file types, project types, default parameters
config.config/productivities.json: Verified pipe installation rates (v0.4) — DN90 to DN630, HDD and open trench, terrain factors
config.config/projects_history.json: Recent projects with chat history and usage stats

knowledge_base.methodologies: Per project-type scheduling strategies (distribution, supply, single, engineering)
knowledge_base.skills: Specialized AI capabilities (OCR, conflict resolution, etc.)

ai_apis.deepseek: api.deepseek.com (OpenAI-compatible, via openai SDK) — cheap worker

key_libraries.reportlab: PDF generation with Cyrillic (DejaVu Sans fonts in fonts/)

infrastructure.fonts: fonts/DejaVu Sans — required for Cyrillic in PDF export
infrastructure.no_database: All state in JSON files in config/. No SQL, no server.
infrastructure.no_cloud: Runs 100% locally. API calls to DeepSeek and Anthropic are the only external traffic.

project_types_supported.name: Разпределителна мрежа
project_types_supported.description: Many identical sections, pipeline overlap scheduling

pipe_productivities.note: Verified field rates v0.4 — used by AI when calculating durations from document quantities

testing.unit_tests: tests/test_exports.py — PDF and XML export validation
testing.e2e_tests: tests/e2e/ — 10 real Playwright tests (require running app + real API keys)
test_files: test_chat_interaction.py — Chat sends and receives responses
testing.ci: Pre-commit hook runs all 11 tests (1 unit + 10 E2E) before every git commit
testing.failure_comments: Every E2E test has a 'FAILURE означава:' comment showing which module is broken

real_projects_processed.name: Герман
real_projects_processed.pdf_result: 27 GOOD, 1 PARTIAL, 3 SCANNED (0 API calls for 90%)

key_rules_for_developers: knowledge/ files — DO NOT edit without domain reason. They encode field-verified rules.
config/productivities.json — verified v0.4 rates. Change only with field confirmation.
XML export MUST have DurationFormat=5 and Manual=1 — MS Project requirement.
Cyrillic in PDF requires DejaVu Sans from fonts/ — do not remove.
DeepSeek ALWAYS receives full knowledge context (3 levels: minimal/full/verification).
All AI calls go through ai_router.py — never call Anthropic/DeepSeek directly from other modules.
Schedule validation is in schedule_builder.py — errors, warnings, cascade, diff.
self_evolution.py has 3 safety levels — never bypass RED level without user confirmation.

how_to_run.windows: Double-click install.bat (first time), then start.bat or desktop shortcut

what_is_missing_next_steps: SaaS / multi-user deployment (currently single-user local only)
Cloud storage for projects instead of local filesystem
More project types (road construction, electrical, etc.)
Auto-learning from new projects into knowledge base
